en.title: Retreats & Sabbaticals
paragraphs: Subject to approval and availability, we host scholars and ministers (pastors, priests, and/or missionaries) who seek a personalized spiritual retreat, pilgrimage, or sabbatical enhanced by the unique spiritual and textual resources of Andrew's Corner and Thessaloniki, Greece.

A comfortable, fully-furnished apartment (96m2 / 1033ft2) with two bedrooms, immediately above Andrew's Corner, could welcome a family, couple, individual, or small group of friends. Special library privileges (including a dedicated study carrel and after-hours access) could be arranged for scholars with a writing project.

Those on sabbatical or retreat are welcome to join, to any degree desired, in the full range of communal activities at Andrew's Corner. In addition, a personalized retreat schedule and/or spiritual direction sessions are available on site by appointment. We can also assist in arranging a pilgrimage to spiritual destinations in our vicinity, such as Mt. Athos, or to sites along the footsteps of Paul.

Possible timeframes range from one weekend (for a mini-retreat) to a semester (or two) in length for a writing sabbatical. Please contact us, via email, for pricing, availability, and more information.
